scripts.build: npm run build:site && npm run minify:json
scripts.sync:uma: node scripts/gametora.js --what uma --server global --out-uma assets/uma_data.json --char-thumb-dir assets/character_thumbs
scripts.sync:supports: node scripts/gametora.js --what supports --server global --out-supports assets/support_card.json --out-support-hints assets/support_hints.json --support-thumb-dir assets/support_thumbs
scripts.refresh:data: npm run sync:skills-all && npm run sync:uma-skills
scripts.format: npm run format:js && npm run format:py
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:py
scripts.test: npm run test:team-trials && npm run test:rating-shared
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test
